hooks.command: if [ -d .factory ]; then printf 'Re-read AGENTS.md — it routes this repository (skills, docs, tools, policies). If mid-Work-Order, resume from .factory/work-orders/<WO>/state.yaml.\n'; else printf 'This repo has the Lepton factory plugin but is not initialized. Run /factory-init to set it up and seed your first feature.\n'; fi
